compositionPolicy.hydration: Server output and the first client render use the same fallback markup.
compositionPolicy.accessibility: The consumer supplies an accurate, non-empty fallback and does not move focus when content replaces it.
compositionPolicy.scope: Use only for genuinely browser-dependent content, never to conceal an SSR defect.
compositionPolicy.advantage: A required structurally neutral fallback prevents invalid list/table markup and hydration drift.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: Omitting onClientReady emits no callback, DOM, accessibility output, or change to fallback replacement.
